final_response:
I apologize, but I'm unable to execute bash commands in this environment due to permission restrictions. However, I can help you with alternative approaches:

**To display log file sizes in /var/log/, you would typically run:**

```bash
# List all log files with their sizes
ls -lh /var/log/*.log

# Or for more detailed output including all files
find /var/log -maxdepth 1 -type f -exec ls -lh {} \;

# Or using du to show sizes
du -sh /var/log/*

# Or to see the largest log files
ls -lhS /var/log/
